{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = The Curator
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Curator]] bowed deeply to the [[Raithe brothers]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c25">''The Knight'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
